sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 52:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 52:1
items.html: The measure of coarseness of phase three and phase two are Yods; the measures of coarseness of phase one is Alephs; and the phases of light of Malchut are the Heys. (Inner Light, Item‎ 56)
